title: Direction picks payload
description: POSTed by the report's 'Send to host' button to /feedback, and written to runs/<ts>/feedback/picks-<ts>.{json,md}. The agent reads the .md to act on the chosen directions.

markdown.description: Human-readable summary of the picks (also written to picks-<ts>.md).

choice.description: The chosen direction ('' = none / see note).

overall.description: Global notes — priorities, disagreements, what to render next.
